# Wiki Index

Pages in this fixture vault:

## concepts

- [[jwt-token-lifecycle]] — How a JWT is issued, transmitted, verified, and expired.
- [[session-vs-token]] — Contrast between server-side sessions and stateless tokens.

## modules

- [[auth-middleware]] — HTTP middleware that verifies Authorization header.
- [[user-store]] — User record schema and lookup helpers.

## processes

- [[login-flow]] — POST /login → verify password → issue JWT → set cookie.
